title: Enhanced Hoppers
description: Speed up your hoppers! Increase the amount of items and speed up item transfer rates
body:
# Speeds up your hopper transfer rate!

## By using the simple commands:

/hopperspeed <tick> changes the speed of items going through (lower value is better)

/hoppertransferrate <item count> changes the amount of items going through per tick

This mod is only required on the **server side**, but if you wish to use the mod on a singleplayer world, adding to the client is **necessary**.
